# Pull Request Template

## Description
<!-- Provide a brief summary of the changes and the rationale behind them. -->

## Traceability
- [ ] **Closes #ID**
- [ ] **No-Issue-Reason:** <!-- (bootstrap | ci-repair | typo | emergency | release) -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Governance / Architecture adjustment

## Checklist
- [ ] **Tests:** New and existing tests pass locally.
- [ ] **Risk:** Impact on existing flows has been assessed.
- [ ] **Rollback:** Steps to revert this change if necessary are documented or simple.
- [ ] **Docs:** Relevant documentation (ADR, Specs, README) updated if needed.

## Evidence
<!-- Add screenshots, logs, or command output to prove the change works. -->

## Reviewer Notes
<!-- Any specific areas you want the reviewer to focus on? -->
